instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission controller shall initialize internal system states during startup.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall set default transmission state when ECU startup is detected.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission controller shall verify memory integrity during startup.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall validate configuration memory checksum during power-on.

L4_requirements: IF Config_Memory_Checksum = Invalid THEN Memory_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission controller shall validate sensor inputs during initialization.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall verify that sensor signals are within valid range at startup.

L4_requirements: IF Sensor_Value OUTSIDE Valid_Range THEN Sensor_Initialization_Fault = TRUE
IF Sensor_Value WITHIN Valid_Range THEN Continue_System_Startup

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission controller shall establish CAN communication during startup.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall verify CAN network availability during initialization.

L4_requirements: IF CAN_Communication_Status = Failed THEN CAN_Initialization_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission controller shall verify gear position during initialization.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall read gear position sensor during startup.

L4_requirements: IF Gear_Position_Sensor_Status = Invalid THEN Gear_Position_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission controller shall initialize actuator control modules.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall perform actuator self-check during startup.

L4_requirements: IF Actuator_Test_Result = Failed THEN Actuator_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission controller shall initialize shift control logic.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall enable shift control after successful startup checks.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission controller shall detect startup failures.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect initialization fault when any startup test fails.

L4_requirements: IF Startup_Test_Result = Failed THEN Initialization_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission controller shall maintain safe state during initialization fault.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall maintain predefined gear when initialization fault occurs.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission controller shall finalize initialization after all checks pass.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall set system ready state when initialization completes successfully.

L4_requirements: IF Initialization_Status = Completed THEN Set_System_State = Ready
